The '''''Hunter''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Along with [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Claw (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Claw'']], the ''Hunter'' attempted to stop a number of Rebels who were heading to [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] after [[Raid on the Suprosa|stealing]] a top secret computer from the Imperial freighter ''[[Suprosa]]''. However, despite help from [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and its own [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] the ''Claw'' was successfully driven off and the Rebels reached Kothlis safely.
